# mgc_container_repository (Data Source)

Retrieves a single repository from a Container Registry by its UUID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mgc_container_repository" "repository" {
  registry_id = mgc_container_registries.registry.id
  id          = "794d667e-95c3-4939-b509-72e51195184f"
}

output "repository" {
  value = data.mgc_container_repository.repository
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique identifier (UUID) of the repository
- `registry_id` (String) ID of the registry containing the repository

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the repository was created
- `image_count` (Number) The number of images in the repository
- `name` (String) Name of the repository
- `registry_name` (String) The name of the registry containing this repository
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the repository was last updated
